characters.name: Archibald
characters.description: Archibald, also known asSir Archibaldis is a male tabby cat who is the uncle ofLampo.  He is a prim and proper cat who believes that cats should show proper cat manners, until when he saw that the crowd didn't like the Buffycats' classical music concert, he lets out his inner rockstar and saves the concert and learns that not every cat has to be proper all the time. He is a prim and proper cat who believes that cats should show proper cat manners, until when he saw that the crowd didn't like the Buffycats' classical music concert, he lets out his inner rockstar and saves the concert and learns that not every cat has to be proper all the time.

characters.name: Baby Pie
characters.description: Baby PieNameBaby PieActorSarah NatochennyFamilyUnnamed MotherFriendsPilou(best friend),Meatball,Lampo,Milady,IgorEnemiesBoss,Blister,ScabLikesPlaying with Pilou, ice creamBiographical informationDislikesUnknownBaby Pieis a baby kitten and isPilou´s new friend, who appeared in "A New Friend For Pilou." Baby Pie is a small kitten with gray fur with white fur around his mouth, on his paws, and on his tail end, and a white tuft on top of his head. He had pink fur around his eyes, and he wears a diaper with a safety pin.  Baby Pie appears to be a cute and playful bundle of joy, but don't let his looks fool you, because when playing or planning something fun, Baby Pie shows to have a mischievous side with a pinch of naughtiness that he is always willing to stir up trouble for any cat who wants to play. However, Baby Pie is still very friendly and is able to help, like in "All Meow For Ice Cream," his super ball kick helped fix Cream's broken ice cream making machine.
characters.personality_section: Baby Pie appears to be a cute and playful bundle of joy, but don't let his looks fool you, because when playing or planning something fun, Baby Pie shows to have a mischievous side with a pinch of naughtiness that he is always willing to stir up trouble for any cat who wants to play. However, Baby Pie is still very friendly and is able to help, like in "All Meow For Ice Cream," his super ball kick helped fix Cream's broken ice cream making machine.

characters.name: Bertie
characters.description: BertieNameBertieDebutMeatball's Secret MoveFriendsBrutusEnemiesAll CatsLikesHis grabbing device, capturing catsDislikesCatsVoiceHenry F. Benjamin Bertie is one of the main antagonist of theBuffycatsand all of the cat characters in44 Cats. Bertie is an overweight man wearing what looks to be much more uniformed brown cat catcher suit. He wears a brown dad cap and brown goggles. He wears brown gloves and has a black belt with an unknown device holstered on his right side. He often travels around with his Mrs. Grabber tool, which a brown glove on a long rod. Bertie is a lot more competent as a cat catcher, seeming to take it more seriously than his cooky friendBrutus. This competence leads to him being a lot more cocky, even taunting the cats at times, saying that he's smarter than them. He does have a mild dopey-ness to him.
characters.personality_section: Bertie is a lot more competent as a cat catcher, seeming to take it more seriously than his cooky friendBrutus. characters.name: Bongo
characters.description: NameBongoGenderMaleSpeciesOrangutanVoiceHD QuinnBongois a recurring character in44 Cats. Bongo is a miniature white-haired orangutan with peach-colored skin. Bongo is friendly, albeit somewhat primitive in nature. He's a tango dancer who used to fear dancing in front of an audience until theBuffycatshad helped him overcome his fear. His favorite foods are bananas and anything that contains bananas. Bongo is friendly, albeit somewhat primitive in nature. He's a tango dancer who used to fear dancing in front of an audience until theBuffycatshad helped him overcome his fear. His favorite foods are bananas and anything that contains bananas.

characters.description: BossNameBossActorHenry F. BenjaminFriendsWinston,Blister,Scab,Meatball(sometimes),Gas(sometimes), Rainbow VillainsMinionsBlister,Scab, Winston's Traps,Scribbly(formerly)EnemiesLampo,Milady,Meatball,Pilou,Gas,Igor,Terry,Cosmo,Baby Pie,Astricat,Granny Pina,Isotta,Scribbly,Neko,Whisper,Bertie and Brutus,Bucky,Sandy,Snoogie,Edison,WrenchLikesBullying the Buffycats, relaxing, hanging out with Blister and ScabDislikesThe Buffycats, Buffycats' singing, failing his missions, Meatball's clumsinessBossis a Chausie-breed cat that frequently bullies the Buffycats. characters.name: Brutus
characters.description: BrutusNameBrutusDebutGaby, The Reporter CatFriendsBertieEnemiesAll CatsLikesHis claw device, capturing catsDislikesCatsVoiceWayne GraysonBrutus is one of the main antagonist of theBuffycatsand all of the cat characters in44 Cats. Brutus is a tall, lanky man wearing a sky blue and yellow-lined backwards cap, black goggles, hazel eyes with thick eye brows, a singular ear ring in his right ear, a giant schnozz of a nose with a mole on the right side of it, crooked and missing teeth, a giant mustache that leads into an even bigger pirate-like black beard, black heavy-duty gloves with a red band on it, an orange-ish rolled up long-sleeve shirt, covered by jean overalls, a gadget belt with a huge visible walkie-talkie on it, white crew length socks and some beat up brown shoes. To complete the fit, he brandishes a long and claw-like cat capturing device. Brutus is often seen crazily yelling and chasing after cats as if its a twisted game of his. He seems a bit insane as in certain episodes he can be found loving and caressing on his cat capturing tool. Brutus is often seen crazily yelling and chasing after cats as if its a twisted game of his. He seems a bit insane as in certain episodes he can be found loving and caressing on his cat capturing tool.

characters.name: Bucky
characters.description: BuckyNameBuckyGenderMaleSpeciesBeagleDebut[A Puppy To Save]FriendsLampo,Pilou,Milady,Meatball,Monsieur LaPalette,Wrench,Edison,Cato,Snoogie,Gas,Igor,Cosmo,Fancey Dancey,Lola,Jumpy,Hope,Piperita,Neko,Olympio,Police Cat,The Cats in Black,Milky,Chock,Fisby,Snobine,Fleur,Baby Pie,Quatermain,Jungle,Archibald,Cream,Pinky Paws,Corney,Astricat,Ambrogio,Glitter,Gaby,Whisper,Scribbly,Peppy,Mimi,Strange Cat,AIDA,Will,Greg,Meow-Paw,Charlie,Buddy,Derence,Lizzy,Blondie,Tutankatmon,Alana,Isotta,Granny Pina,Chef Alfredo,Zoe,Sandy,Sushi,Kataly,Bongo,Robin,Tata,Ginnyunnamed big bellied cousinEnemiesBoss,Blister,ScabLikesHis mom, making new friends, Zoe, not mentioning his dadDislikesBoss,Blister,Scab, being lost, disagreeing with his sisterVoiceBrittany Pressley Buckyis one of the side characters in44 Cats. He is one of the Buffycats's close friends, he isSandy's son,Zoe's brother and the nephew of a big bellied bloodhound. Bucky seems to be a brown beagle-type mix breed with brown eyes. He wears a red collar with a gold pendant on it, the image of a bone engraved on the front of it. Bucky gets introduced to us as a very sad puppy, but he's a real sweet soul. He can be seen many times having fun and playing with The Buffycats with no fuss. At times he can butt heads with his sister Zoe, but at the end of the day, they'll hug it out and he's back to super sweet again.

characters.name: Cato
characters.description: CatoNameCatoFriendsLampo,Milady,Meatball,Pilou,Granny Pina,Isotta,Igor,Cosmo,Edison,Gas,Snoogie,Fleur,Piperita,Neko,Bongo,Fisby,Gaby,AstricatSandy,Bucky,Zoe,Wrench,Whisper,Baby Pie,Jungle,Fancey Dancey,Jumpy,Lola,Hope,Snobine,Archibald,Scribbly,Cream,Ambrogio,Monsieur LaPalette,The Cats in BlackEnemiesWinston,Boss,Blister,Scab,Bertie,BrutusLikesSpectating town events, teaching Cat-FuDislikesMeatball's clumsiness, the cat catchers, bulliesVoiceMarc Thompson Catois one of the side characters in44 Cats. He is the sensei ofMilady, being the one that taught her the discipline of Cat-Fu Cato is a tall black cat with a white face, paws, and tail tip. He has green eyes, wears a red headband and a white belt. Cato is a Cat-Fu master, so the belt is white most likely just to contrast well with his fur Cato is very reserved in nature, rarely seen losing his temper at all. Most likely very chill as he can be seen at most events as a background character in the audience, supporting his furry fellows

characters.name: Chock
characters.description: ChockNameChockFriendsLampo,Milady,Meatball,Pilou,Granny Pina,Isotta,Igor,Cosmo,Edison,Gas,Snoogie,Fleur,Piperita,Neko,Bongo,Fisby,Gaby,Astricat,Sandy,Bucky,Zoe,Wrench,Whisper,Baby Pie,Jungle,Fancey Dancey,Jumpy,Lola,Hope,Snobine,Archibald,Scribbly,Cream,Ambrogio,Monsieur LaPalette,The Cats in Black,Cato,MilkyEnemiesWinston,Boss,Blister,Scab,Bertie,BrutusLikesSpectating town events, being a clown with his brother MilkyDislikesHis brother Milky getting all the praise, the cat catchers, bulliesVoiceWayne Grayson Chockis one of the side characters in44 Cats. He is the brother ofMilkyand runs a circus with him for all the neighborhood cats. Chock is an orange-redish cat with grey eyes, red clown nose, and tan lower face and paws. He wears a blue and bubblegum pink striped top hat with a yellow accessory on the front-right side. He sports a similarly striped blue and pink long-sleeved loose jacket with a gold trim. There is a difficult to see blue shirt he wears underneath that. He wears a pink and white polka-dotted bow-tie on top of that. On his lower half, he rocks a blue and white striped pair of loose pants. He finishes off his fit with the same blue accessory from his hat, nestled right on his jewels. Chock, much like his twin brother, is very jolly at most times you see him in the series, rarely seen angry or upset. He can be seen at some events as a background character in the audience, supporting his furry fellows
characters.personality_section: Chock, much like his twin brother, is very jolly at most times you see him in the series, rarely seen angry or upset. He can be seen at some events as a background character in the audience, supporting his furry fellows

characters.name: Fisby
characters.description: NameDoctor FrisbyGenderMaleSpeciesCatFriendsLampo,Milady,Pilou,Meatball,Mimi(Wife)VoiceHenry F BenjaminDr. Fisby is a cat who debuted in the episode “Cat Fever”. As his title indicates, Fisby is a doctor who cares for sick cats and ensure they feel better. Fisby has reddish-brown fur, navy blue eyes, blue glasses, and large dark brown eyebrows and mustache. Along with his sky-blue collared shirt and red tie, he typically wears attire relating to his profession which consists of a head mirror, white lab coat, and stethoscope. Fisby's voice actor Henry F. Benjamin also voicesBoss.

characters.name: Fleur
characters.description: NameFleurFriendsLampo,Milady,Pilou,Meatball,Snobine,Gas,Baby Pie,Wrench,Gaby,Ambrogio,Cosmo,Igor,Milky,Chock,Edison,Fisby,Neko,CatoEnemiesUnknownLikesHer garden, her friends, FlowersDislikesHer garden being messy, losing her own flowersFleuris a Florist and is obsessed with flowers. Fleuris a cat with orange fur, a 'whiteish' color from between her eyes to the bottom of her face leading down to her chest and white tips on her paws and tail she has rosy blush on her face and green eyes, She wears a green gardening apron supported by a pink waist tie with a ribbon on the back and wears a field hat with pink flowers on the side. Fleuris really friendly towards everyone, she loves her garden and takes good care of the flowers. But she can be devastated to a lost flower or a ruined garden. But in any way Fleur is just happy and jolly the way she is. Fleuris really friendly towards everyone, she loves her garden and takes good care of the flowers. But she can be devastated to a lost flower or a ruined garden. But in any way Fleur is just happy and jolly the way she is.

characters.name: Gaby
characters.description: GabyNameGabyDebutGaby, The Reporter CatFriendsLampo,Pilou,Milady,Meatball,Monsieur LaPalette,Wrench,Edison,Bucky,Snoogie,Gas,Igor,Cosmo,Fancey Dancey,Lola,Jumpy,Hope,Piperita,Neko,Olympio,Police Cat,The Cats in Black,Milky,Chock,Fisby,Snobine,Fleur,Baby Pie,Quatermain,Jungle,Archibald,Cream,Pinky Paws,Corney,Astricat,Ambrogio,Glitter,Cato,Whisper,Scribbly,Peppy,Mimi,Strange Cat,AIDA,Will,Greg,Meow-Paw,Charlie,Buddy,Derence,Lizzy,Blondie,Tutankatmon,Alana,Isotta,Granny Pina,Chef Alfredo,Zoe,Sandy,Sushi,Kataly,Bongo,Robin,Tata,Ginny,EnemiesBertie,BrutusLikesHosting town events, taking pictures for her magazineDislikesbeing feared by her friends, the cat catchersVoiceLisa Ortiz Gaby is a side character of the44 Catsseries. She runs Daily Cat magazine and occasionally hosts town events. Gaby is a slim and brown Siamese cat who wears a teal T-shirt with a speech bubble print on the front and denim shorts with a red belt, with a pink heart buckle, around her waist. She also wears flashy accessories like two green bangle bracelets on her wrists and a red loose collar with a gold bell and she always carries her camera around her neck. Gaby is a sassy and very social cat that loves nothing more than collecting news and reports, and taking pictures for her Daily Cat News magazine, but is also a complete blabbermouth that loves to add false information and embarrassing photos about other cats that hurts her friends' feelings without knowing it, until when she was in danger of being trapped in Brutus' van, she learned her lesson and made a promise to never add mean gossip into her magazine.

characters.name: Gas
characters.description: GasNameGasFriendsBuffycats,Snobine(girlfriend),Igor,Cosmo,Boss(on rare occasions), other catsEnemiesBoss,Winston,Blister,Scab, Bertie and BrutusVoiceBilly Bob ThompsonChris Phillips (some episodes)Gasis a stinky cat that has a powerful stench that can make you gag and faint for a second until you recover for some fresh air. He was first introduced inGas, the Stinky Cat. Gas' fur is brown with dirty spots all over and his eye color is chocolate brown. He wears a black vest, a red and white polka dot bowtie, a black bowler hat on his head, and like Scab, his whiskers are crooked. Gas may appear as an aggressive and mean cat, but in the end, he as a very good heart. As Shown in "Detective Pilou" when he involuntarily steals a flower ofFleurfor his girlfriendSnobine. characters.name: GattoCarlo
characters.description: GattoCarloNameGattoCarloGenderMaleSpeciesCatAge20 (Cat Years)45 (Human Years)FriendsLampo,Milady,Pilou,Meatball, Tap Tap, Tic, Tac and Toe,Boss, other catsEnemiesBoss(sometimes)Likesbeing an host, hosting a concertDislikeshaving hiccupVoiceCarlo Conti (Italy) 45 (Human Years) GattoCarlo is a major character in the 44 Cats Series, and one of the Buffycats closest friend and band director. GattoCarlo is kind, serious, but extremely scared of being humiliated on stage, but the Buffycats will prove to him that with a little courage all fears can be overcome, and all his fears vanish.

characters.name: Granny Pina
characters.description: Granny PinaNameGranny PinaEnemiesWinstonLikesHer cats, cookingDislikesWinston trying to blow up her houseVoiceMarca LeighGranny Pinais an elderly woman who is a main character from the series44 Cats. In season 2, her granddaughterIsottais introduced. Granny Pina is the owner of the 4Buffycats. She is known for the spaghetti and meatballs she cooks. She also wears a white apron. Granny Pina cares about her cats but will ask them for help around the house when she needs it. She is generally upbeat. Granny Pina cares about her cats but will ask them for help around the house when she needs it. She is generally upbeat.

characters.name: Hope
characters.description: Hope Hope is a light pink cat with blue eyes. She wears a pink bowtie on her head and sits in a baby stroller. Hope was at one point very attached to her pacifier despite being older than the normal age for kittens to be attached to her pacifiers. When Hope didn't have a pacifier, she would wail until she got it back. Hope found it entertaining whenPiloubumped into something that caused her trouble. Eventually, Hope overcame her need for a pacifier. Hope was at one point very attached to her pacifier despite being older than the normal age for kittens to be attached to her pacifiers. When Hope didn't have a pacifier, she would wail until she got it back. Hope found it entertaining whenPiloubumped into something that caused her trouble. Eventually, Hope overcame her need for a pacifier.

characters.name: Igor
characters.description: IgorNameIgorFriendsLampo,Milady,Meatball,Pilou,Granny Pina,Isotta,Cato,Cosmo,Edison,Gas,Snoogie,Fleur,Piperita,Neko,Bongo,Fisby,Gaby,AstricatSandy,Bucky,Zoe,Wrench,Whisper,Baby Pie,Jungle,Fancey Dancey,Jumpy,Lola,Hope,Snobine,Archibald,Scribbly,Cream,Ambrogio,Monsieur LaPalette,The Cats in BlackEnemiesWinston,Boss,Blister,Scab,Bertie,BrutusLikesOccasionally being the speaker town events, helping his furry friends, lifting weightsDislikesthe cat catchers, bullies, his own strength sometimesVoiceSarah Natochenny Igoris one of the side characters in44 Cats. He is the strongest member of the entire cast and is often seen lifting weights or working out. Also he enjoys being the speaker/host of town events from time to time. Igor looks to be a Tonkinese-breed cat with blue eyes, tan body, dark face, paws, and tail, with the tip being light. He wears a black leather biker jacket, and a red and white polka-dotted ascot scarf. Igor's demeanor is as strong as his physicality, speaking very heftily, but you always know he's a friendly character. Igor is very chill and happily will speak for town events going on and he's doubly down to help a furry friend in need, putting his super strength to good use often. Igor can occasionally get annoyed but he always manages to keep a cool head and go on about his business.

characters.name: Isotta
characters.description: IsottaNameIsotta PinaDebutA Very Special Girl!FriendsLampo,Milady,Pilou,Meatball,MimiEnemiesBoss,WinstonLikesThe Buffycats, playing music, making new friendsDislikesFeeling left outVoiceSydney CizikIsottais a new main character inSeason 2of44 Cats. She isGranny Pina's granddaughter. She is the only human who can understand the cats and talk to them. She becomes theBuffycats' closest friend and likes to spend her time in the Buffycats' clubhouse. She is named after Isotta Straffi, who is the real-life daughter of Iginio Straffi (the creator of the show). Isotta always wears a red cat-ears headband which symbolizes how she is "like one of the cats." She also wears a white collared shirt, a red vest, a purple skirt, and red boots. She has brown hair and brown eyes. Her design is a caricature of Isotta Straffi.

characters.description: JumpyNameJumpyGenderMaleSpeciesCatAgeUnknown but looks like the age of 7-10-13FriendsLampo,Milady,Pilou,Meatball,Fancey Dancey,Lola,Chock,Milky,Cosmo,Baby Pie,Monsieur LaPalette,Igor,Cream, Other catsEnemiesBoss, Blister, Scab, WinstonLikesDancing, hanging out with the Boom boom-steppers, hip-hop, Dancing competitionsDislikesFailing, losing in competitions (because they never) messing up, Interruption by BossJumpyis one of the other members in Theboomboom-steppers, he is a young dancer. Jumpy is very active and joyful too. Jumpy is a short cat with Grey-and-White fur, He wears a beanie with stripes, a star-designed Hood And he has Emerald-Green Eyes. Jumpy was never seen alone, He is only seen with the Boom boom-steppers and in backgrounds. He was always shown in Anything related to dancing, and he will always support his furry fellows. characters.name: Kataly
characters.description: KatalyNameKatalyDebutFour Cats And A CamelFriendsLampo,Pilou,Milady,Meatball,AbdulEnemiesWinston,Boss,Blister,ScabLikesAbdul, orange juice, runningDislikesbeing away from his owner, bulliesVoiceHenry F. Benjamin Katalyis one of the side characters in44 Cats. He is a baby camel that loves orange juice. He belongs toAbdul. Kataly is a brown camel with long brown hair and and green eyes. He wears a red harness. Kataly is generally jumpy and easily spooked, as he is only a baby camel. He is very kind and affectionate when calmed down though.

characters.name: Lampo
characters.description: LampoNameLampoGenderMaleFriendsMilady,Meatball,Pilou,Granny Pina,Isotta,Igor,Cosmo,Edison,Gas,Snoogie,Fleur,Piperita,Neko,Bongo,Fisby,Gaby,AstricatSandy,Bucky,Zoe,Wrench,Whisper,Baby Pie,Cato,Jungle,Fancey Dancey,Jumpy,Lola,Hope,Snobine,Archibald,Scribbly,Cream,Ambrogio,Monsieur LaPalette,The Cats in Black,Quatermain,TutankatmonEnemiesWinston,Boss,Blister,Scab, Bertie and Brutus,Birds,The Cats in Black(briefly)LikesPlaying the guitar, hanging out with his friendsDislikesMeatball's clumsiness, Boss, getting bulliedVoiceSarah NatochennyLampois the lead singer and lead guitarist of theBuffycatsand one of the main characters in44 Cats. Lampo is a small tabby kitten. He has an orange coat, blue eyes, and blue markings on his body (notably a blue lightning bolt going down the right side of his face to his eye). He usually wears a green t-shirt with a yellow lightning bolt on it and a black baseball cap he wears back-to-front. His concert attire consists of a black jacket, blue headband, and blue belt. Lampo tends to be playful and overconfident. He is arrogant at times, but is always down to help a friend in need. Lampo tends to be playful and overconfident. He is arrogant at times, but is always down to help a friend in need.
